title: serpocaulon psychotrium
intro: Serpocaulon psychotrium is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the rock fern. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Serpocaulon psychotrium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which may be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
